title: Oil prices jump after Trump says Iran will 'pay the price' for failing at peace deal
summary_full: Oil prices rose after the U.S. launched military strikes against Iran, raising concerns that renewed clashes may threaten shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: Oil prices rose after the U.S. launched military strikes against Iran, raising concerns that renewed clashes may threaten shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Oil prices jump after Trump says Iran will 'pay the price'
